name: Dynamic Directory (Detail Pages)
description: For JavaScript-heavy directory sites where each listing item links to a separate detail page with full company/seller information.
default_prompt: Extract all exhibitor/seller details including company name, contact information, location, product categories, brands, and social media.
default_fields_wanted: name, country, city, address, postal_code, website, email, phone, description, product_categories, brands

hints.notes: This pattern is common for trade show / exhibition exhibitor directories. The listing page is JS-rendered with A-Z alphabet tab navigation. Each item card links to a separate detail page containing full contact info, product categories, brands, and social media links. The planner should look for tab/letter navigation and item cards with detail links.
